name: Wicker Lamp Shade Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add natural charm to your home decor by lighting up with the Wicker Lamp Shade from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This brown lamp shade features a woven design made with rattan for a textured and artistic look. Designed to fit small lamp bases, this drum-shape shade makes a beautiful addition to any space in your home.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
